a.style: font-family:'Playfair Display', Georgia, 'Times New Roman', 'Liberation Serif', serif

text.tspan: Average learning outcomes vs. GDP per capita, 2020
Average learning outcomes correspond to harmonized scores across standardized, psychometrically-robust
international and regional student achievement tests. GDP data is adjusted for inflation and for differences in
the cost of living between countries.
Data source: World Bank (2024); Our World in Data; World Bank (2023)
Note: GDP per capita data is expressed in international-$ at 2017 prices.
